  {"idx": 3, "aspects": [{"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Fallout 4 succeeds in being an incredible game, one that will stick with me for my life"}, {"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "talk to the lady in the red dress in Goodneighbour and keep passing the charisma checks, trust me"}]},
  {"idx": 4, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 5, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 6, "aspects": [{"aspect": "exploration", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "lots of dog and monster and fighting is fun"}, {"aspect": "emotional_impact", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "might make you cry the bit with the echo flower that says thats my wish too made me cry a little but im really tired"}, {"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "i love pagetti and thank you mr fox"}]},
  {"idx": 7, "aspects": [{"aspect": "art_style", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "cute"}]},
  {"idx": 8, "aspects": [{"aspect": "emotional_impact", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "i cried"}]},
  {"idx": 9, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 10, "aspects": [{"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "a huge amount of content"}, {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "you will probably like it a lot"}, {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the free trial is available on Steam or on their website. Give it a shot."}]},
  {"idx": 11, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 12, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 13, "aspects": [{"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "IT REALLY IS CRACK"}]},
  {"idx": 14, "aspects": [{"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "I've played it over 1000 hours"}]},
  {"idx": 15, "aspects": [{"aspect": "updates", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "RIP the owner"}, {"aspect": "emotional_impact", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the game is still so good today i wish this got more updates"}]},
  {"idx": 16, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 17, "aspects": [{"aspect": "emotional_impact", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "timeless masterpiece"}]},
  {"idx": 18, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 19, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 20, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "fun"}]},
  {"idx": 21, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 22, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "this game is so goated"}, {"aspect": "customization", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "mods add a whole new level of customization and options to how you want to play"}, {"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "it runs really well even with mods"}, {"aspect": "build_variety", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "all of the components to the game gives me such a dopamine hit i now feel the need to completely finish the game to its fullest potential"}]},
  {"idx": 23, "aspects": [{"aspect": "art_style", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "What's not to love about this game, from the characters, to the tasks, to the visuals you get"}, {"aspect": "quest_design", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "there is always room to grow"}, {"aspect": "relaxation", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "a wonderful way to unwind after a long day of being an adult - I'd recommend this game to everyone I know!"}]},
  {"idx": 24, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Super cute and fun farming game! It has a lot of different elements for everyone to enjoy :)"}]},
  {"idx": 25, "aspects": [{"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "I would recommend buying this game, but only on discount."}, {"aspect": "atmosphere", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Very nice atmosphere and music"}, {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "neutral", "evidence": "The story is okay, and it touches an important area of our existence, which is death."}]},
  {"idx": 26, "aspects": [{"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "This game is beautiful but it's clear to me the only curse on this family is all of the OSHA violations"}]},
  {"idx": 27, "aspects": [{"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The narratives are so so SO gorgeous. If you haven't play it, PLAY IT. If you have played it, PLAY IT AGAIN. This is one of the games that you have to give it some time to sink in, but it's definitely worth it."}]},
  {"idx": 28, "aspects": [{"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "its not mind-boggling or anything exaggerated and each of the characters' story made the most of their time."}, {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "a great purchase this 2025 winter sale pls buy if you can"}]},
  {"idx": 29, "aspects": [{"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Solid storytelling with some really good atmosphere"}, {"aspect": "bugs", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "There were a few glitches with Molly and Calvin's stories but they were a one time thing (but I had to restart the game to fix these which was annoying)."}, {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "a super short game too (2-2.5 hours max)"}]},
  {"idx": 30, "aspects": [{"aspect": "multiplayer", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Fun and time consuming. Better with friends"}]},
  {"idx": 31, "aspects": [{"aspect": "updates", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Just when I was done playing this game they release a new update"}]},
  {"idx": 32, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 33, "aspects": [{"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "absolute factory, do not download if you have a life."}]},
  {"idx": 34, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "Very deep and sometimes frustrating but also very rewarding if you put in the time.  Graphics are basic (arguably dated) but gameplay loop is challenging (constant puzzles) and rewarding."}]},
  {"idx": 35, "aspects": [{"aspect": "emotional_impact", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "classic certified"}]},
  {"idx": 36, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Fun and goofy game, highly recommend playing with the steam work shop."}]},
  {"idx": 37, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 38, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 39, "aspects": [{"aspect": "emotional_impact", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "i hope that they improve nothing new to say here, read the other reviews. The game is pretty bad atm. So much lost potential."}]},
  {"idx": 40, "aspects": [{"aspect": "updates", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "i hope that they improve"}]},
  {"idx": 41, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 42, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 43, "aspects": [{"aspect": "combat", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "guns are cool"}]},
  {"idx": 44, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 45, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "portals but like twice"}]},
  {"idx": 46, "aspects": [{"aspect": "emotional_impact", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Must be one the most quintessential puzzle games out there for any type of gamer...yeah thats it...thats the review."}]},
  {"idx": 47, "aspects": [{"aspect": "emotional_impact", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "I love PORTAL 2"}]},
  {"idx": 48, "aspects": [{"aspect": "emotional_impact", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Thanks to my vocalist friend for gifting me this ♥♥♥♥. Played for 66 minutes. Great ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ game! Can't wait to play more tmrw, but it's 4:15 AM. Might go buy the first game."}]},
  {"idx": 49, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "game with portals its what you want"}]}
]

  {"idx": 20, "aspects": [{"aspect": "bugs", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "key to free the refugee hostages failed to appear"}, {"aspect": "quest_design", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "NPC, by the name mom'a refused dialog before I even got the quest"} ]},
  {"idx": 21, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Fun game, very much a sequel to Wasteland 2 and the original Fallouts."}, {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "bit short, without the DLCs you've got about 30 hours from start to finish"}, {"aspect": "difficulty", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "On higher difficulty settings, if you don't properly plan out your character level ups, you can end up with a real hard end game"}, {"aspect": "balance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Most of the difficulty comes from sheer chance on your to hit and resist rolls"}, {"aspect": "quest_design", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Steeltown DLC adds some crappy new stacking status effects, that are more annoying than interesting to play around with"}, {"aspect": "quest_design", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Cult of the holy detonation DLC seems to be a bit lacking in stuff to do, like they wanted to implement more but cut a bunch in the end."} ]},
  {"idx": 22, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Super fun game that plays like a mix of Xcom and Fallout."}, {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The story is good"}, {"aspect": "writing", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "writing is very poor"}, {"aspect": "quest_design", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Factions are almost entirely useless, as there's only a few and once you do a few quests with them, they're largely forgotten until the end game credits"}, {"aspect": "quest_design", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Also wish your squad mates had more dialogue with each other, as the few times Lucia or Kwon added commentary during the game, it was very welcome."} ]},
  {"idx": 23, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "a more modern version of Fallout 1, 2 and Tactics."} ]},
  {"idx": 24, "aspects": [{"aspect": "bugs", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "full of ♥♥♥♥ bugs didn't finish the game because of it and prolly never will, and i read on net that devs know about the bugs but didn't want to fix them so i guess ♥♥♥♥ devs what to do"} ]},
  {"idx": 25, "aspects": []},

  {"idx": 27, "aspects": [{"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "One round always becomes ten."}, {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "I'm unemployed or have genuinely given up on having a life."} ]},
  {"idx": 28, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 29, "aspects": [{"aspect": "multiplayer", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "I LITERALLY CANT EVEN PLAY THIS GAME BECAUSE EVERY GAME IS EITHER AFK's PEOPLE TROLLING/ TEAM KILLING / LOSING ON PURPOSE."}, {"aspect": "cheating", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "THERES THIS NEW THING GOING AROUND IF YOU REPORT PPL EVERY ROUND IN GAME, THEY WILL GET 1 day > 2 days> 1week bans"}, {"aspect": "community", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "AVOID WASTING HOURS ON CS2"}, {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "I JUST DROPPED A 30 BOMB FOR A BUNCH OF NERDS ALL DROPPING HARD SLURS AND KILLIG EACHOTHER. FOR ME TOO  THEN GET BANNED  FOR 2 DAYS LMFAOOOOO THIS GAME SYSTEM AND ITS PLAYERBASE IS A JOKE."} ]},
  {"idx": 30, "aspects": [{"aspect": "bugs", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Game is literally unplayable. Tech keeps turning off, incense will not burn, firelight takes 10 minutes to light."} ]},
  {"idx": 31, "aspects": [{"aspect": "updates", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "It took them 2 years of work to put out an update that would never pass QA in any respectful game studio."}, {"aspect": "developer_conduct", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Approximately half a billion $ in revenue from game and merch and yet, they still want to feed community slop, seriously?"} ]},

  {"idx": 36, "aspects": [{"aspect": "graphics", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The graphics are much better than the previous games, and Lara has a more mature look."}, {"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The jungle environment is about 90% of the game and feels so realistic that you might actually get lost!"}, {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "neutral", "evidence": "The story and gameplay are a bit weaker compared to the earlier titles."} ]},
  {"idx": 37, "aspects": [{"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "I absolutely love the environment and the style of the game. I love the great stealth and the emotions that were there."}, {"aspect": "puzzles", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The puzzles were also a lot of fun,"} ]},
  {"idx": 38, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 39, "aspects": [{"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "I love the graphics, especially the watercolor look."}, {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The story is good, but unfortunately the writing is very poor."}, {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The game is a bit short, without the DLCs you've got about 30 hours from start to finish."}, {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "If this game is on sale, it's a 10/10 PURCHASE, and I would absolutely recommend it to anyone who loves mystery and exploration games."} ]},
  {"idx": 40, "aspects": [{"aspect": "controls", "sentiment": "neutral", "evidence": "Controls are a little clunky regardless of whether you use gamepad or mouse/keyboard, but the game is a lot of fun."} ]},
  {"idx": 41, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 42, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 43, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Very unique vibes. Haven't experienced anything like it."} ]},

  {"idx": 46, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "I've never been as conflicted about a game as I am with Infinite."}, {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The game mechanics, storylines, characters, everything."}, {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "The plot is fine but every line of dialogue is cringe."}, {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "It's fun, but for some reason it just doesn't feel like a part of the series."} ]},
  {"idx": 47, "aspects": [{"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "great game whit great twist"} ]},
  {"idx": 48, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "A game that offers a lot of suspense and combat"} ]},
  {"idx": 49, "aspects": [{"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Plot twist so hard I had to sit in silence after"} ]}
